title: Eva character you would partake in a sexual activity with
display_title: Eva character you would partake in a sexual activity with
wikitext:
[]: Eva character you would partake in a sexual activity with? Post by Joppu » Wed Apr 08, 2009 1:01 pm Definitely Maya - "Status?" - "It's no use, the entry plug is not responding!" By the way this isn't a serious thread

[]: Post by NemZ » Wed Apr 08, 2009 1:11 pm I'd also prefer Maya (assuming she's at all interested), but if it would save the planet I suppose I could stand going back in time and hooking up with Yui before Gendo got to her. She seemed nice enough before the meglomania set in.

[]: Post by Joseph the PRPD » Wed Apr 08, 2009 1:27 pm I never thought someone would actually make a thread like this. Asuka is scared.

[]: Post by Axell » Wed Apr 08, 2009 1:33 pm :viralpalm: god, why?

[]: Post by NemZ » Wed Apr 08, 2009 1:38 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: Asuka is scared.

[]: Post by Reichu » Wed Apr 08, 2009 1:48 pm Everybody should know my answer by now. But in case they're newbies and they haven't gotten sick of hearing it yet... Misato's dad. Also, in the event that I should find myself 40 or more meters tall: Sachiel and Zeruel. At the same time. (Would that make me a pederast? Hmm.)

[]: Post by NemZ » Wed Apr 08, 2009 1:54 pm Reichu wrote: Also, in the event that I should find myself 40 or more meters tall: Sachiel and Zeruel. At the same time. (Would that make me a pederast? Hmm.)

[]: Post by BrikHaus » Wed Apr 08, 2009 1:55 pm Fem-Kaworu, obviously. And Iruel if there's time.

[]: Post by BobBQ » Wed Apr 08, 2009 2:01 pm None of them. ...Well, maybe fem-Kaworu once she's grown up a bit.

[]: Post by Dartz » Wed Apr 08, 2009 2:01 pm Lol... 'Sexual Activity" Sounds almost playschool.

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Apr 08, 2009 2:06 pm I don't do jailbait so... Kaji or Misato. Hell, a threesome if they're willing. Twsa'teotu wrote: Because there's only two teams with no middle ground.

[]: Re: Eva character you would partake in a sexual activity wit Post by Joppu » Wed Apr 08, 2009 2:06 pm Twsa'teotu wrote: isn't Maya playing for the other team? Because there's only two teams with no middle ground.

[]: Post by Eric Blair » Wed Apr 08, 2009 2:12 pm Reichu wrote: Misato's dad.

[]: Post by Axell » Wed Apr 08, 2009 2:21 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: But yes, as far as canon goes, our dear Maya-chan is a lesbian.
